title: Crude feed pump seal failure
description: During unit startup, the mechanical seal of pump P-101 failed releasing hydrocarbon to the bund. Operators isolated the pump and activated the deluge system.
probable_root_cause: Pump was started against a closed suction valve causing dry running, which destroyed the seal faces.
preventive_action: Implement startup interlock to confirm suction valve open and seal flush established before start

title: Recycle gas compressor trip
description: Compressor C-200 tripped on high axial displacement leading to an unplanned unit slowdown.
probable_root_cause: Thrust bearing wear from prolonged operation beyond recommended overhaul interval.
preventive_action: Restore overhaul interval and add continuous thrust monitoring

title: Knockout drum high level
description: High liquid level in knockout drum V-2003 risked liquid carryover to the compressor suction.
probable_root_cause: Level transmitter LT-2003 drift was not detected due to missed calibration.
preventive_action: Add LT-2003 to the critical instrument calibration register

title: Relief valve premature lift
description: PSV-4501 lifted below set pressure during a minor process upset, venting to flare.
probable_root_cause: Set pressure drift due to spring relaxation; valve overdue for testing.
preventive_action: Reduce PSV test interval and track per statutory schedule

title: Distillation column flooding
description: Atmospheric column T-500 experienced flooding causing off-spec product for 6 hours.
probable_root_cause: Tray fouling increased pressure drop beyond hydraulic limits.
preventive_action: Plan tray cleaning at next turnaround and monitor delta-P trend
